description_long: This cabinetry unit features a long, continuous countertop with a woodgrain finish, supported by a series of modular base cabinets and overhead storage compartments. The base section includes multiple drawers and doors, with a combination of open shelving and closed storage, providing versatile organization options. The upper section is composed of both open shelves and closed cabinets, some with vertical doors and others with horizontal access. The rightmost section of the base has an open leg space, likely intended for seating or equipment placement. The cabinetry is finished in a neutral beige and white palette, with clean, modern lines and minimalistic hardware. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as offices, workshops, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, modular cabinetry unit with woodgrain countertop, multiple drawers, doors, and open shelving in beige and white tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the cabinetry, highlighting the depth of the countertop and the vertical alignment of the upper and lower cabinets.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length of the cabinetry, with visible drawers, doors, and open shelving, as well as the woodgrain countertop spanning the entire unit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the upper and lower sections, with the open leg space more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back panels of the cabinetry, the open leg space, and the configuration of the base and upper compartments.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, drawers, and open shelf
